emails.body: We have been doing this here in Houston via a Unanimous Consent of the Directors of the Company appointing the individual(s) as agents and attorneys-in-fact. Do you sugguest I proceed this way or via the Power of Attorney below? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 10/11/2000 08:59 AM Cindy Buckley 10/11/2000 06:44 AM
